requirement: [Memory Allocation] Gracefully handle allocation requests exceeding available VRAM

test_cases.description: Verify that the system gracefully handles memory allocation requests that exceed available VRAM
preconditions: Memory allocation request exceeding available VRAM
steps: Initiate a memory allocation request that exceeds the available VRAM
Monitor system response and behavior
Check for any error messages or warnings related to VRAM exhaustion
Verify that the system does not crash or become unresponsive
test_cases.expected_result: The system should gracefully handle the memory allocation request, providing appropriate feedback or error handling without crashing

test_cases.description: Ensure the system can handle multiple memory allocation requests that collectively exceed available VRAM
preconditions: Multiple memory allocation requests exceeding available VRAM
steps: Simultaneously initiate multiple memory allocation requests that collectively exceed the available VRAM
Monitor system response and behavior under high memory load
Check for any performance degradation or system instability
Verify that the system can prioritize and manage memory allocation requests effectively
test_cases.expected_result: The system should manage multiple allocation requests exceeding VRAM without crashing or significant performance degradation

test_cases.description: Test the system's behavior when a memory allocation partially exceeds available VRAM
preconditions: Memory allocation partially exceeding available VRAM
steps: Initiate a memory allocation request that partially exceeds the available VRAM
Monitor system response and behavior during partial allocation
Check for any warnings or errors related to partial allocation
Verify that the system allocates memory up to the available VRAM limit
test_cases.expected_result: The system should allocate memory up to the available VRAM limit when a request partially exceeds it

test_cases.description: Evaluate system performance when under continuous memory stress exceeding available VRAM
preconditions: Continuous memory stress exceeding available VRAM
steps: Apply continuous memory stress exceeding the available VRAM
Monitor system performance metrics such as FPS, response time, and memory usage
Check for any performance degradation or system crashes
Verify that the system can recover gracefully after memory stress is removed
test_cases.expected_result: The system should maintain stable performance metrics under continuous memory stress and recover without crashing once stress is removed

test_cases.description: Integrate memory allocation exceeding VRAM with the system's memory management module
steps: Initiate memory allocation requests exceeding available VRAM
Ensure the memory management system is actively monitoring and adjusting memory usage
Check for any conflicts or issues between memory allocation and management
Verify that the system can dynamically adjust memory allocation to prevent VRAM exhaustion
test_cases.expected_result: The system should seamlessly integrate memory allocation exceeding VRAM with the memory management system, dynamically adjusting allocations to prevent VRAM exhaustion
